package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for multiple_bind_sources_into_same_struct_without_precedence_contract: One DTO being filled from body, query, and path without a clear precedence policy.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule100NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule100NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule100NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario100Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule100NegativeService, input Rule100NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
